rationale: No conflict. Section 48.307 provides flat per-student state aid ($40) for instructional materials. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised values, or property tax revenue, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not affect this provision.
quote: For each student enrolled in the district, a school district is entitled to additional state aid for each school year in an amount equal to $40, or a greater amount provided by appropriation, to procure instructional material
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional-materials state aid provision.
